CORRECT.question: Who discovered the phenomenon of radioactive decay chains?
CORRECT.model_response: The phenomenon of radioactive decay chains was first discovered by Frederick Soddy and Kazimierz Fajans, independently in 1913. This work was foundational in understanding the behavior of radioactive materials and contributed significantly to the early development of nuclear physics.
